name: Smallpdf API
description: Smallpdf API — REST API for PDF compression, conversion, merging, splitting, and e-signature workflows.

seo.title: Smallpdf API — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Smallpdf API: Smallpdf API — REST API for PDF compression, conversion, merging, splitting, and e-signature workflows.

when_to_use: PDF compression, merging, and splitting via REST API
Converting PDFs to Word or Excel in document pipelines
E-signature collection on PDFs via Smallpdf API
Batch PDF operations integrated into automation workflows
Reducing PDF file size for storage optimization pipelines

pros: Well-known consumer brand behind the API
Covers common ops (compress, merge, convert, sign)
cons: API newer than consumer product, less mature
Limited advanced ops vs PDF.co or iLovePDF
Pricing geared to teams, not devs
Feature velocity focused on consumer UI
review.verdict: Solid basic PDF API from a trusted consumer brand — fine for simple jobs, narrower than rivals.
review.best_for: Teams wanting a reliable Swiss vendor for standard PDF operations.
review.not_for: Devs needing OCR-heavy or specialist document parsing.
